ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "Validation Error", "message": error.description, "errorCode": "VALIDATION_001", "timestamp": now() as String, "path": attributes.requestPath default "" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "Service Temporarily Unavailable", "message": "We're experiencing technical difficulties with our billing system. Please try again later.", "errorCode": "DB_001", "timestamp": now() as String, "retryAfter": "300" // 5 minutes }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "Data Processing Error", "message": "Unable to process your request. Please check your input and try again.", "errorCode": "DB_002", "timestamp": now() as String }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "External Service Unavailable", "message": "One of our external services is temporarily unavailable. Some features may be limited.", "errorCode": "HTTP_001", "timestamp": now() as String, "retryAfter": "60" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "Request Timeout", "message": "Your request is taking longer than expected. Please try again.", "errorCode": "HTTP_002", "timestamp": now() as String }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "Authentication Required", "message": "Please provide valid authentication credentials.", "errorCode": "AUTH_001", "timestamp": now() as String }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "Access Denied", "message": "You don't have permission to access this resource.", "errorCode": "AUTH_002", "timestamp": now() as String }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "Resource Not Found", "message": "The requested resource was not found.", "errorCode": "HTTP_003", "timestamp": now() as String }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "Bad Request", "message": "The request could not be processed. Please check your input.", "errorCode": "HTTP_004", "timestamp": now() as String }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "Data Processing Error", "message": "Unable to process the data format. Please contact support if this persists.", "errorCode": "TRANSFORM_001", "timestamp": now() as String }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "Security Violation", "message": "A security policy has been violated. This incident will be reported.", "errorCode": "SECURITY_001", "timestamp": now() as String }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "Rate Limit Exceeded", "message": "You have exceeded the maximum number of requests. Please try again later.", "errorCode": "RATE_001", "timestamp": now() as String, "retryAfter": "60" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "Internal Server Error", "message": "An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later or contact support.", "errorCode": "GENERIC_001", "timestamp": now() as String, "supportReference": uuid() }

logger.doc:name: Circuit Breaker Open
logger.message: Circuit breaker is open for external service

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "Service Temporarily Unavailable", "message": "The external service is temporarily unavailable. We're working to restore it.", "errorCode": "CIRCUIT_001", "timestamp": now() as String, "retryAfter": "300" }
